changes: Prompt Token Saver: overhauled compression engine — pre-compiled regexes, longest-match-first phrase ordering, fixed pass ordering and PROT restore bug, structural boilerplate pass, moved multi-word synonyms to phrase dict
Prompt Token Saver: added optional domain packs (SQL, React, DevOps, Data Science) as sidebar checkboxes with localStorage persistence
Prompt Token Saver: updated token estimate to 3.5 chars/token for post-compression abbreviated text
New tool: Prompt Token Saver — compress verbose AI prompts to reduce LLM token usage with phrase collapsing, abbreviations, and an environmental impact calculator
New tool: SVG Validator & Repair — validate, auto-repair and preview SVG files with split code/preview view, XML error detection, xmlns/viewBox repair, and script sanitization
Image Resizer: drag-to-crop on the thumbnail before resizing, with aspect-ratio presets (1:1, 4:3, 16:9, 3:2, 9:16, 2:3) and a rule-of-thirds overlay
XD → Figma Packager: automatically strips the outer clip-path that XD adds to SVG exports, so artwork isn't clipped inside Figma

New tool: PDF Converter — convert PDF pages to PNG or JPG images (ZIP for multi-page), bundle PNG/JPG/WebP images into a PDF with drag-to-reorder, and extract text from any digitally-created PDF as a downloadable .txt file
New tool: PDF Organiser — reorder and merge PDF pages in the browser; drag thumbnails to rearrange, remove individual pages, and download a new merged PDF
New tool: Color Namer — paste any HEX, RGB or HSL value to find its closest named color using CIE Lab ΔE perceptual matching, with five alternatives shown
New tool: Image Dominant Color Extractor — extract dominant colors from any image using median cut; copy swatches as HEX/RGB/HSL, export as CSS variables or JSON

ICO Favicon Generator: added Apple Touch Icon (180×180), PWA icons (192×192 + 512×512) with manifest.json, SVG favicon with dark mode via CSS prefers-color-scheme, optional dark variant image upload, Modern/All size presets, and a copyable HTML head snippet
ICO Favicon Generator: download is now a ZIP containing favicon.ico plus a separate PNG for every selected size
Home page: search-first layout, cleaner copy
All tools now listed in the sidebar
Home page redesigned with categorised tool directory and featured sections
Tints & Shades: click-to-copy tooltip on colour swatches and hex labels
PDF compressor: lossless FlateDecode re-encoding option for screenshots and illustrations
Usage tracking replaced with explicit "👍 This helped me" button
Font Tools: combined Font Converter, Font Inspector and Font Pairs into a single tabbed page
Contrast tool: WCAG AAA (7:1) nearest-match colour suggestions and redesigned right column
Colors: new Tints & Shades tab with CSS variable and JSON export
